---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for the project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

# Feature Request

Thank you for suggesting improvements for Mental Health Safety Analyzer.

Feature requests help improve the system and guide future development.


## Feature Description

Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.


## Problem or Need

Explain what problem this feature would solve.

Why is this improvement important?


## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this feature could work.


## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or approaches you considered.


## Additional Context

Add any additional information that may help evaluate this feature.

Examples:

- Related research
- Examples from similar systems
- Screenshots
- Technical considerations


## Impact

Explain how this feature could improve the project.

Possible impacts:

- Better user experience
- Improved safety analysis
- Higher reliability
- Better explainability
- Easier maintenance


## Implementation Notes

If you have technical suggestions, describe them here.

Include possible:

- Required components
- API changes
- Model changes
- Documentation updates


## Checklist

Before submitting this request, please confirm:

- [ ] I checked that a similar feature request does not already exist.
- [ ] I described the purpose of this feature clearly.
- [ ] I considered the impact on the existing system.
- [ ] I removed any sensitive information.
